$description: Surface roles — aliases into the semantic color layer (tokens/semantic/color.json). Hand-owned (NOT regenerated by tokens:migrate). Not consumed at runtime yet; the CSS build lands in Phase 2.

popover.$description: Floating surfaces: popover, dropdown, select content, tooltip panel.

muted.$description: Subdued fills: hover states, secondary areas, skeleton base.

overlay.$description: Modal scrim behind dialog/sheet/drawer. Aliases the kit's `background-color` extra (oklch(0 0 0 / 30%)).
